'''shavupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placebo|placebo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placebo|placebo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shavupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shævipith|shævipith]] || [[word:shævipij|shævipij]] || [[word:shævipish|shævipish]] || [[word:shævipi|shævipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shavuvuputh|shavuvuputh]] || [[word:shavuvupuj|shavuvupuj]] || [[word:shavuvupush|shavuvupush]] || [[word:shavuvupu|shavuvupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shavuputh|shavuputh]] || [[word:shavupuj|shavupuj]] || [[word:shavupush|shavupush]] || [[word:shavupu|shavupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shavufputh|shavufputh]] || [[word:shavufpuj|shavufpuj]] || [[word:shavufpush|shavufpush]] || [[word:shavufpuf|shavufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shavuputhu|shavuputhu]] || [[word:shavupuju|shavupuju]] || [[word:shavupushu|shavupushu]] || [[word:shavupuku|shavupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shavuputh|shavuputh]] || [[word:shavupuj|shavupuj]] || [[word:shavupush|shavupush]] || [[word:shavupu|shavupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shavuputhul|shavuputhul]] || [[word:shavupujul|shavupujul]] || [[word:shavupushul|shavupushul]] || [[word:shavupukul|shavupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shavuputhuthu|shavuputhuthu]] || [[word:shavupujuju|shavupujuju]] || [[word:shavupushushu|shavupushushu]] || [[word:shavupuku|shavupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shavuputhun|shavuputhun]] || [[word:shavupujun|shavupujun]] || [[word:shavupushun|shavupushun]] || [[word:shavupukun|shavupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shavuputhuoro|shavuputhuoro]] || [[word:shavupujuoro|shavupujuoro]] || [[word:shavupushuoro|shavupushuoro]] || [[word:shavupukuoro|shavupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
